records.snippet_en: neration Carbon dioxide emissions value (tCO2e) Market-based Scope 2 GHG emissions linked to purchased electricity bundled with instruments, energy bundled with attributes about the energy generation 942,426 Total market-based Scope 2 GHG emissions 2,510,274 Share % 37.55% Table 65. Share of contractual instruments used for the sale and purchase of energy based on unbundled energy attribute claims Carbon dioxide emissions value (tCO2e) Market-based Scope 2 GHG emissions linked to purchased electricity bundled with instruments such as guarantee of origins or renewable energy certificates 49.52 Total market-based Scope 2 GHG emissions 2,510,274 Share % 0.00 % Biogenic emissions of CO2 from the combustion or bio-degradation of biomass separately from the Scope 1 GHG emissions amount to 387,804 tCO2e. No conversion to CH4 or N2O was performed due to the unavailability of applicable emission factors. (no indicators available from currently used databases and national sources). During the reporting period, the ORLEN Group’s total market-based Scope 2 GHG emissions were 2,510,119 tCO2e. The extent to which the undertaking’s Scope 3 GHG emissions are measured using primary data obtained is 0% – at the current stage of development of the organisation’s data collection and carbon footprint calculation processes, only literature-based emission factors, updated annually, are applied. The calculation of the ORLEN Group’s organisational carbon footprint across Scope 3 and Scope 1 and 2 was conducted in accordance with the guidelines of the Greenhouse Gas (GHG) Protocol: The calculation of the ORLEN Group’s organisational carbon footprint across Scope 3 and Scope 1 and 2 was conducted in accor- dance with the guidelines of the Greenhouse Gas (GHG) Protocol: • World Resources Institute and World Business Council for Sustainable Development, Greenhouse Gas Protocol. A Corporate Accounting and Reporting Standard REVISED EDITION (Scope 1);
